body_txt: A character whose weapon is greaves, shoes, a leg-mounted weapon, or a natural feature of their leg anatomy with lethal applications (e.g. clawed feet, Impaling Arthropodal Legs , or sharp bony spines). One of the less improbable weapon choices out there, but still odd. Like The Grand List of Console Role Playing Game Clichés says for vambraces, expect these characters to still buy their weapons in the weapon store, even if they logically should be in the armor store. Related to Power Fist , except with boots instead of gloves; may overlap with Extremity Extremist . Close to, but not to be confused with, Murderous Thighs . Supertrope to Blade Footwear and Leg Cannon . See also Tricked-Out Shoes , Combat Stilettos and Shoe Slap . No relation to An Arm and a Leg .
